name: Cherry Liqueur 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut up the cherries and remove the pits.
2. Take about one-half of the pits and wrap them in cheesecloth; crush with a hammer.
3. Put the cut cherries and crushed seeds into a large jar.
4. Add the brandy to the jar and seal tightly.
5. Let steep for approximately 3 weeks.
6. Strain off the liquid using a wire strainer, wringing out any remaining liquid from the cherries wrapped in cloth.
7. Add the sugar syrup; shake gently and filter through cheesecloth.
